title: Add apply() and decision_path() methods to tree-based estimators
description:
sklearn DecisionTree and ensemble estimators expose:
- apply(X) → Array1<usize> of leaf indices that each sample falls into
- decision_path(X) → CSR sparse matrix of shape (n_samples, n_nodes) marking the path each sample traversed

For ensembles, returns shape (n_samples, n_estimators) for apply and a stacked CSR for decision_path. Used for path-based interpretation tools.

Lower priority — neither blocks normal classification/regression workflows.
